text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon placed excellently in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hand in hand, we've been able to work our way
through the first three pivotal years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On a day of respite, while basking in the glory of
our accomplishments...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Saying that she wants to conduct a psychological
test, Agnes Tachyon makes herself comfortable in
my office.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
An object is buried deep in your backyard. What
is this object?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get the meaning behind the
question, but I suppose I have no choice but to
play along.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What types of things might be buried in a yard?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The answer you choose reveals the one thing you
wish for someone else to uncover.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Color me surprised.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way! We've been tricked once again!
How bold of them to claim a one-hundred
percent accuracy rate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of that, I'm more curious about the
reason behind her sudden interest in
psychological tests.
choice_data_list:
Why the interest in psychology tests all of a
sudden?

Why the interest in psychology tests all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
At present, I am studying the fundamental factor
behind the social animal, the factor otherwise
known as "emotion."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I faintly remember her saying something similar
once before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Lately, I've become increasingly curious about the
powers that stem from factors like "enthusiasm"
and "passion."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back on it, she expressed her interest in
emotions quite a while before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was a passing curiosity, but that no
longer seems to be the case.
choice_data_list: What's gotten you so interested in this?
What's gotten you so interested in this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Something opened my eyes, you see. It was
during the Arima Kinen, from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After I placed first... I was assailed by a
thunderous applause—a roaring cheer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That raw energy emanating from the stands was
enough to make my hair stand on end—to make
my heart race. I was utterly dumbfounded.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was at that moment when the notion came to
me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Winning the race that day... No, not just that, but
managing to reach the Classics with my own two
feet...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All of these accomplishments were, perhaps, only
possible due to emotion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It occurred to me that I might have severely
underestimated the true extent of its power.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've always recognized the importance of its
effects on muscular activity, both internal and
external.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However, the results have far exceeded my
predictions. Observing its potential has been such
a thrill!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indubitably, this holds the key to further research
that will allow us to surpass our limitations!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I thought it prudent to draw upon
references from a wide range of literature in order
to further my research.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon turns to face me, squinting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
As luck would have it, I have, at my beck and call,
a guinea pig highly responsive to emotions of
every sort.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In these three years, thanks to your feelings, I
have...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She stops mid-sentence.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Um, n-never mind. Let's drop this subject.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Shut up. Forget everything I said.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you're my trainer, which means you must
be earnest in your duties as my guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I'm forced to undergo psychological
test after psychological test till dusk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anyhow, my new journey together with Agnes
Tachyon has only just begun.
